actionUnits.condition: Directly invoke MainMenu.PlayGame (MonoBehaviour fileID 1908371634, guid f43df138c8422d842a109f05ee02b96e) to simulate UI OnClick. Expected: SceneManager.LoadScene(GetActiveScene().buildIndex + 1). No Collider/EventTrigger present on Mainmenu; this is a harness-level call.
Directly invoke MainMenu.Quite (MonoBehaviour fileID 1908371634, guid f43df138c8422d842a109f05ee02b96e) to simulate UI OnClick. Expected: Application.Quit(). Note: quitting may be ignored in editor.
